summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Corrections Part 4 changes: (1) Admin assignment via dropdown for unassigned WOs/Breakdowns, tech claim functionality; (2) Breakdown closure governance - mandatory technician assignment; (3) Redundant 'Start Repair Now' button removed; (4) AWS Life % ticking with hybrid runtime calc; (5) Warnings always dispatch Inspection WO (no Corrective option); (6) Admin start doesn't self-assign; (7) Breakdown-WO assignment sync.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin creates unassigned breakdown (status=OPEN, assigned_to=None)
Backend: Admin complete without assigned_to rejected with 400
Backend: Admin complete WITH assigned_to succeeds (status=CLOSED, assigned_to='tech')
Backend: Tech completes unassigned breakdown -> auto-assigns to tech
Backend: Admin assigns WO via dropdown (status=ASSIGNED)
Backend: Assigning breakdown syncs linked WO assignment
Backend: Admin start on unassigned breakdown -> IN_PROGRESS but assigned_to stays null
Backend: Tech start on unassigned breakdown -> auto-assigns to tech
Backend: Reliability metrics show non-null categories with life_pct > 0 and hours_since_last_failure
Frontend: Admin sees technician dropdown + Assign button on unassigned WO (no Claim button)
Frontend: Repair page shows NO 'Start Repair Now' button
Frontend: Repair page shows assignment section with technician dropdown
Frontend: Warning dialog shows NO Corrective option
Frontend: Warning dialog shows note 'An Inspection work order is always dispatched'
Frontend: AWS page displays non-zero life % bars (205.1%, 2.6%, 0.1%)
